# rez-next Performance Results

> This file is automatically updated on every push to `main` by the
> [Performance Benchmarks](.github/workflows/benchmark.yml) workflow.
>
> To regenerate locally:
> ```bash
> cargo bench 2>&1 | python metrics/benchmarking/scripts/parse_criterion.py > /tmp/bench.json
> python metrics/benchmarking/scripts/generate_results.py --bench-json /tmp/bench.json
> ```

*Results will appear after the first CI run.*
